title: valeriana officinalis var. major
intro: Valeriana officinalis var. major, also known as the large valerian or valerian root, is a variety of the valerian plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of valeriana officinalis var. major lie in its essential oils, which contain valepotriates and isovaleric acid, making it a natural sedative and anxiolytic. The health benefits of this plant include relief from insomnia, restlessness, and anxiety, as well as a reduction in stress and improved sleep quality. Valeriana officinalis var. major can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, as well as used in aromatherapy, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting relaxation and well-being.
